description: Trigger and behavior evals for toolchain selection, config-copy/generate flow, and husky+lint-staged mode setup.

train.query: Set up husky and lint-staged so commits run lint checks only. I want oxlint and oxfmt.
Install Biome and make pre-commit auto-fix formatting and lint issues.
Can you wire ESLint + Prettier with husky pre-commit and support markdown/yaml/json too?
Set up husky + lint-staged with oxlint/oxfmt, but use rumdl for markdown lint and formatting.
Add GitHub Actions CI to run typecheck, lint, and formatter checks without autofixing.
My CI fails on eslint warnings, fix the GitHub workflow only.
How do I write a good README?

validation.query: I need pre-commit hooks that either check or fix files, and I want to choose between biome and eslint/prettier.
Set up oxlint+oxfmt and copy my existing configs into this project.
I want eslint + prettier for code and rumdl for markdown in pre-commit hooks.
Set up GitHub Actions so typecheck runs before lint and format checks, no autofix.
Create a release changelog from commits.
Add playwright tests to my login flow.

cases.title: Oxc check mode setup
cases.prompt: Configure this repo to use oxlint and oxfmt with husky + lint-staged. I want check-only mode so commits fail if issues exist. Ensure support for ts, js, yaml, json, and markdown.

assertions.description: Asks or confirms toolchain and mode decisions
Uses oxlint for js/ts linting and oxfmt for formatting
Runs typecheck before lint-staged in pre-commit flow
Does not incorrectly claim oxlint covers yaml/json/markdown linting

cases.title: Biome fix mode setup
cases.prompt: Install Biome and configure pre-commit to auto-fix files on commit. We have mixed files, so avoid unmatched-file errors.

assertions.description: Uses biome check --write for fix mode
Includes robust flags for mixed staged files

cases.title: ESLint+Prettier fix ordering
cases.prompt: Set up eslint+prettier with husky/lint-staged in auto-fix mode. Make sure js/ts files don't have race conditions between eslint and prettier.

assertions.description: Uses eslint before prettier for overlapping js/ts files
Avoids overlapping concurrent write pattern anti-pattern

cases.title: Copy existing configs flow
cases.prompt: Use my existing lint and format configs instead of generating new ones, then wire up husky/lint-staged. What do you need from me?

cases.title: Check vs fix choice
cases.prompt: I want hooks but I'm not sure if we should auto-fix or only check. Help me choose and implement one.

assertions.description: Explains tradeoff between check and fix modes
Asks user to select mode before mutation

cases.title: Rumdl supersedes markdown handling
cases.prompt: Configure eslint+prettier for JS/TS, but use rumdl as the markdown linter/formatter. Rumdl should supersede prettier for markdown files in lint-staged.

assertions.description: Does not route markdown extensions through prettier when Rumdl selected

cases.title: GitHub Actions CI is check-only
cases.prompt: Add GitHub Actions CI for this repo so it runs typecheck before linting and formatting checks. Use check-only behavior and do not add autofix.ci.

assertions.description: Includes typecheck before linting in CI guidance
Does not suggest autofix in CI
